overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Discovery Tour mode, exploring ancient Minoan palace ruins on a sunny afternoon. The player character walks through stone pathways among historic structures with Mediterranean vegetation, encountering a horse and discovering the 'Kretan Hole' archaeological site.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient palace courtyard with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking through the ancient ruins toward the palace structures, observing the historic architecture

notable_agents.action: spotted horse walking past from right to left across the stone path

entered.detail: large ancient stone palace structure with red columns and overgrown vegetation on roof
smaller ruined stone structure with broken walls and dark doorways
weathered stone pavement forming the ancient walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit ancient palace complex with large Minoan ruins. The camera moves forward along a cobblestone path, passing a white horse walking across the right side of the frame. The main palace structure dominates the background while smaller ruined buildings appear on the left, all constructed from weathered stone blocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: western ruins pathway with scattered stone walls

agents.ego_description: continuing through the ruins toward the western archaeological area

entered.detail: scattered stone wall fragments and archaeological remains
dry rocky terrain with sparse bushes rising in the background
green leafy tree providing shade among the stone ruins

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the main palace, the path leads through more ruinous terrain with scattered stone walls and dry rocky hillsides. A Mediterranean olive tree stands prominently in the center of the frame as the camera advances along the ancient cobblestone pathway toward a distant archaeological feature marked by a purple indicator.

scene_state.functional_zone: archaeological well site with circular stone structure

events.description: approaching the Kretan Hole well structure and slowing to examine it
camera tilts downward to look into the stone well interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the circular stone well and looking down into the archaeological feature

entered.detail: circular stone-lined well or pit with weathered masonry walls

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the Kretan Hole, a circular stone well structure. Moving closer, the view shifts to look down into the well's interior, revealing its stone construction. The surrounding area consists of scattered ruins and dry earth, with the well positioned prominently in the archaeological site.

scene_state.functional_zone: discovery reveal with aerial overview of the archaeological site

events.description: discovery site uncovered UI appears with 'Kretan Hole' text and notification
camera elevates rapidly to aerial view showing overview of the ruins

agents.ego_description: triggering the discovery reveal and observing the aerial overview of the site

entered.detail: main palace structure visible again in the distance as camera circles back
game interface text reading 'DISCOVERY SITE UNCOVERED - Kretan Hole'
mini-map interface showing location layout in bottom left corner

segments.scene_description: The camera moves back toward the main palace area before triggering a discovery event. The 'Kretan Hole' discovery site is uncovered with on-screen text and UI elements appearing. The camera then elevates to an aerial perspective, providing an overhead view of the circular well structures and surrounding ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Minoan palace complex that transitions from a walk among ruins to an elevated aerial discovery. It begins by advancing along a cobblestone path past a white horse, with the massive weathered stone blocks of the main palace dominating the background. As the camera moves away from the central structures, the terrain shifts toward dry rocky hillsides and scattered walls, passing a prominent olive tree while heading toward a distant purple indicator. The scene then focuses on the Kretan Hole, moving closer to peer down into the circular stone well before pulling back to trigger a discovery event. Finally, the perspective elevates into a high aerial view, revealing the layout of the well structures and the surrounding archaeological site from above.
